user_query: Recommend some food replacements for beef and other ingredients in our existing diet. Also, provide me with the diet plans for each day of the week, which also include some pizza and dessert options. Additionally, generate a random baby pig picture to make the diet plans more visually appealing.

TaskList.description: Identify suitable food replacements for beef and other common ingredients in the existing diet.
Create a weekly diet plan that incorporates the identified food replacements along with pizza and dessert options.
Generate a random baby pig picture to accompany the diet plans visually.
Compile the weekly diet plan and the baby pig image into a visually appealing format.
